'''24 Tredway''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Sil'Lume asteroid belt]] of the [[Sil'Lume system/Legends|Sil'Lume system]], owned by [[Axton Tredway]]. Axton was slain by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge]] on this asteroid. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Governor [[Sebastian Parnell]] later destroyed the asteroid.
